web.name: Dharma: Telugu Astro, Calendar & Gold
web.description: Free Telugu Panchangam, Ramayana, Mahabharata, Bhagavad Gita, Rashi predictions, Mantra audio, Dharma quiz, Neethi Suktalu, Sanskrit words, gold prices, festivals & more.

expo.description: Rediscover the wisdom your grandparents knew. ధర్మ is a daily Telugu companion for sacred stories, panchangam, and timeless values — for families, students, and seekers. One story every day from Valmiki Ramayana and Vyasa Mahabharata. The Bhagavad Gita, Neethi Suktas from Chanakya · Vidura · Thirukkural, Stotras and Mantras, Sanskrit word of the day, Dharma Debate, daily Quiz, and Kids Stories. Plus accurate Drik-Ganita panchangam, festival and Ekadashi calendar, Vedic horoscope, matchmaking, muhurtam finder, daily Rashi predictions, live gold/silver prices, and nearby temple finder. Aligned to school Sanskrit and Indian History learning — every story cites its source (Valmiki Sarga, Vyasa BORI Critical Edition, Gita Press Gorakhpur). Character portrayals follow the original scriptures, not TV serials or movies. Bilingual Telugu / English. Free for everyone. మూల గ్రంథాల ఆధారంగా రోజువారీ కథలు, శ్లోకాలు, నీతి సూక్తాలు — తల్లిదండ్రుల నుండి విద్యార్థుల వరకు అందరికీ. వాల్మీకి రామాయణం, వ్యాస మహాభారతం (BORI Critical Edition), గీతా ప్రెస్ భగవద్గీత ఆధారంగా.
